title: rosa sericea var. omeiensis
intro: Rosa sericea var. omeiensis, also known as the Chinese rose, is a deciduous shrub native to the mountainous regions of China. It belongs to the Rosaceae family and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Rosa sericea var. omeiensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
